case_title: GERALDINE M MCTIGUE VS. RODNEY AUBRE LAWLESS

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-09-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-20-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNINSURED MOTORIST, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCTIGUE, GERALDINE M AS TO DEFENDANT LAWLESS, RODNEY AUBRE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-20-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-19-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-28-2019

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-09-2019 CONTINUED TO JUN-11-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). **NOTE: THIS CASE IS SUBJECT TO DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B) IF THERE IS NO APPEARANCE ON THE NEXT HEARING DATE AND COMPLIANCE.** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-11-2019 AT 10:30 AM PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68608(B). THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST GERALDINE M MCTIGUE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-09-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-24-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER VACATING SANCTION AS TO GERALDINE M MCTIGUE IMPOSED ON APR-09-2019.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCTIGUE, GERALDINE M ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-11-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-09-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
VERIFIED PETITION TO SET ASIDE SANCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCTIGUE, GERALDINE M

parties.name: MCTIGUE, GERALDINE M 500 STANYAN STREET APT. 306 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Continued To Jun-11-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jun-11-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2019 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
